landing.whatsapp.mockup.reminder.message: You have a Pilates appointment tomorrow at 09:30 with Ece.

landing.whatsapp.mockup.changes.previewLabel: WhatsApp appointment update and cancellation notices
landing.whatsapp.mockup.changes.cancelledTitle: Your appointment on July 22 at 11:00 was cancelled.
landing.whatsapp.mockup.changes.cancelledNote: Message us whenever you are ready to rebook.

landing.whatsapp.mockup.teamDigest.previewLabel: Daily WhatsApp appointment summary sent to a practitioner
landing.whatsapp.mockup.teamDigest.note: 4 appointments total · Full details in Devu

landing.whatsapp.mockup.quickReply.previewLabel: WhatsApp quick-reply and automated response flow
landing.whatsapp.mockup.quickReply.confirmationMessage:
Your appointment is confirmed ✅
July 20 · 09:30 · Devu Studio
See you soon!
landing.whatsapp.mockup.quickReply.cancellationMessage:
Your appointment is cancelled ❌
July 20 · 09:30 · Devu Studio
Message us whenever you are ready to rebook.

landing.whatsapp.mockup.setup.previewLabel: Guided WhatsApp Embedded Signup in Devu
landing.whatsapp.mockup.setup.title: Connect WhatsApp in a few clicks
landing.whatsapp.mockup.setup.body: Choose your business account and phone number without dealing with technical settings.
landing.whatsapp.mockup.setup.readyBody: You can start using your automations.

landing.whatsapp.tabs.title: Appointment reminders
landing.whatsapp.tabs.sub: Sent at the right time with Confirm and Cancel buttons.
landing.whatsapp.tabs.captionText: Choose how long before the appointment to send it and Devu delivers it automatically.

landing.whatsapp.tabs.title: Updates and cancellations
landing.whatsapp.tabs.sub: Tell clients about every change instantly.
landing.whatsapp.tabs.captionTitle: Your calendar changes, your client knows
landing.whatsapp.tabs.captionText: When the date, time, practitioner, or location changes, or an appointment is cancelled, Devu sends the right notice.

landing.whatsapp.tabs.title: Daily team summary
landing.whatsapp.tabs.sub: Send every practitioner their schedule each morning.
landing.whatsapp.tabs.captionText: Practitioners receive time, client, service, and location details in one WhatsApp message.

landing.whatsapp.tabs.title: Smart quick replies
landing.whatsapp.tabs.sub: Automatically respond to Confirm and Cancel choices.
landing.whatsapp.tabs.captionText: When a client taps a button, Devu confirms or cancels the appointment and sends your chosen reply.

landing.whatsapp.tabs.title: Connect in a few clicks
landing.whatsapp.tabs.sub: Through Meta's secure Embedded Signup flow.
landing.whatsapp.tabs.captionText: Continue with Facebook, choose the business account and phone number, and Devu completes the connection securely.
